summary: Re-verification after context fork: Shift Filtering (no cross-shift data leakage) and Full Kit Transfer features are FULLY WORKING. Backend: 11 passed, 1 skipped. Frontend: All UI flows verified with screenshots.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Shift Leakage FIXED: Morning tab ONLY shows records with shift=morning
✓ Shift Leakage FIXED: Night tab ONLY shows records with shift=night/evening
✓ No cross-shift data leakage verified via UI testing
✓ Morning shift shows: cooking activity with 'morning' badge, 'COLLECTION RECORDS (1) - MORNING SHIFT ONLY'
✓ Night shift shows: cleaning activities with 'Paused' status (different records)
✓ Full Kit Transfer: POST /api/events/transfer-kit endpoint works correctly
✓ Full Kit Transfer: Transfer dialog has 'Transfer Type' selector with 'Item Transfer' and 'Full Kit Transfer' options
✓ Full Kit Transfer: Selecting 'Full Kit Transfer' shows kit selector dropdown with all kits
✓ Full Kit Transfer: Info message confirms 'Damaged/lost items will remain unchanged'
✓ recordMatchesShift() function at line 1056 properly filters by shift type
✓ getCompletedRecords() function at line 1113 filters records by shift type

context_for_next_testing_agent: Both features fully verified: 1) Shift filtering works - Morning tab shows only morning records (cooking with 'morning' badge), Night tab shows only night records (cleaning with paused status). 2) Full Kit Transfer works - Transfer dialog has Transfer Type selector, Full Kit Transfer option shows kit dropdown with all kits, info message confirms damaged/lost items excluded.
